# 据吉文档

> AI数据标注一站式服务平台使用手册

- [页面未找到](https://docs.jujidata.com/jujidata-docs/zh/zh/404/): 您正在寻找的页面不存在或已被移动。请检查网址，使用导航浏览各个板块，或返回首页。
- [隐私政策](https://docs.jujidata.com/jujidata-docs/zh/zh/privacy/): 了解我们如何收集、使用和保护您的个人数据，您对信息拥有的权利，以及如何联系我们。
- [博客](https://docs.jujidata.com/jujidata-docs/zh/zh/blog/): Read product updates, release highlights, and practical tips that explain what’s new, why it matters, and how to get the most value from this project.
- [据吉文档](https://docs.jujidata.com/jujidata-docs/zh/zh/docs/): 据吉文档的主页面，包含所有指南、参考和资源。

## 博客

> Read product updates, release highlights, and practical tips that explain what’s new, why it matters, and how to get the most value from this project.

- [Example Post](https://docs.jujidata.com/jujidata-docs/zh/zh/blog/example-post/): Learn how to write clear, structured product update posts that explain what changed, why it matters, and how users can successfully adopt new features.

## 据吉文档

> 据吉文档的主页面，包含所有指南、参考和资源。

- [试标空间 (Sandbox)](https://docs.jujidata.com/jujidata-docs/zh/zh/docs/quick_guides/): 通过小样任务测试供应商交付质量，降低大规模作业风险。
- [模版中心](https://docs.jujidata.com/jujidata-docs/zh/zh/docs/templates/): 预置 10 大主流 AI 标注模版，支持高度自定义配置。
- [Resources](https://docs.jujidata.com/jujidata-docs/zh/zh/docs/docs/resources/): Discover curated links to official docs, tools, templates, and learning materials that help you deepen your knowledge and get more from this project.

### 试标空间 (Sandbox)

> 通过小样任务测试供应商交付质量，降低大规模作业风险。


### 模版中心

> 预置 10 大主流 AI 标注模版，支持高度自定义配置。

- [2D 矩形框标注 (Bounding Box)](https://docs.jujidata.com/jujidata-docs/zh/zh/docs/docs/2d-%E7%9F%A9%E5%BD%A2%E6%A1%86%E6%A0%87%E6%B3%A8-bounding-box/): 最通用的物体检测标注模版，支持多标签分类与复杂属性关联。
